allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./mock/essays.json'\); console.log\('=== 第一篇文章 tokens 示例 ==='\); const s0 = d[0].sentences[0]; console.log\('EN:', s0.en\); console.log\('Tokens:', JSON.stringify\(s0.tokens\)\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('=== 各文章概览 ==='\); d.forEach\(e => console.log\(e.id, '|', e.title, '| 难度' + e.difficulty, '|', e.readingTime + 's', '|', e.sentences.length + '句', '| tokens校验:', e.sentences.every\(s => s.tokens.length > 0\) ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const l=fs.readFileSync\('mock/essays.jsonl','utf-8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(Boolean\);console.log\('行数:',l.length\);console.log\('首行有效:',l[0].startsWith\('{'\)\);console.log\('末行有效:',l[l.length-1].endsWith\('}'\)\);let ok=0;l.forEach\(\(line,i\)=>{try{JSON.parse\(line\);ok++}catch\(e\){console.log\('第'+\(i+1\)+'行解析失败:',e.message.substring\(0,60\)\)}}\);console.log\('合法行:',ok,'/',l.length\)")
